chief_complaint: A 37-year-old woman presented to the emergency department with pleuritic chest pain.
history: She had a history of pulmonary embolism and a recent cesarean section.
exam: Vital signs: not specified. Physical examination findings: not specified.
labs: D-dimer: negative. CT pulmonary angiography: single-subsegmental pulmonary embolism.
differentials: Pleuritic chest pain due to musculoskeletal strain
correct_ranking: Pleuritic chest pain due to musculoskeletal strain
